_source: Uniclass 2015 Table SL — Industrial rooms (verbatim from primary NBS Source mirror declared in sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §1, supplemented by buildig/uniclass-2015 community CSV v1.22)
_note: Per-entry _verification_status records sourcing. NBS Source primary mirror traversed 2026-06-06 across all SL_30 sub-groups and relevant SL_90 storage/utility codes. SL_30 sub-groups confirmed: SL_30_10 Mineral extraction spaces (7 codes), SL_30_20 Nuclear and chemical management spaces (2 codes), SL_30_30 Mineral processing spaces (3 codes), SL_30_40 Animal and plant products processing spaces (18 codes), SL_30_50 Manufacturing spaces (9 codes), SL_30_60 Cleaning and maintenance spaces (13 codes), SL_30_80 Kinetic power generation spaces (2 codes), SL_30_85 Marine and water maintenance spaces (5 codes), SL_30_90 Warehousing and distribution spaces (5 codes). All SL_30 sub-group pages note 'No current codes — Contains codes that are not in use' under Uniclass v1.35 April 2026; codes retained as nbs_sourced per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2 (deprecated-but-present leaf nodes are transcribed verbatim and flagged). SL_90_50 Storage spaces (50 current codes) and SL_90_90 Plant and control spaces (16 current codes) recruited for industrial-support entries. Engineering-consensus canonical_ids for industrial sub-types not individually enumerated in Uniclass v1.35 cite CIBSE LG1:2018 (Industrial Lighting) §3 as primary authority for illuminance targets, supplemented by BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2 manufacturing sub-clauses, HSE Workplace (Health, Safety and Welfare) Regulations 1992 Approved Code of Practice for minimum lux/noise/ventilation thresholds, and BS 8233:2014 (Guidance on Sound Insulation and Noise Reduction for Buildings) §8 industrial noise criteria. cross_references.cibse_lg + nrm2 stay null per Sprint Z deferral; building_type_codes back-filled at Z.D.1.

entries._inference_note: NBS Source SL_30_50_30 'Heavy industrial spaces' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_50 Manufacturing spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Uniclass v1.35 marks SL_30_50 as 'No current codes'; retained verbatim per sprint-Z-source-provenance.md §2. Illuminance: 200 lux maintained per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1 (rough work) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.1. Noise criterion: 85 dB(A) LEQ (8-hr) per HSE COSHH/noise ACoP 2005.

NBS Source SL_30_50_43 'Light industrial spaces' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_50 Manufacturing spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Illuminance: 300 lux maintained per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1 (medium work) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.2.

NBS Source SL_30_50_50 'Manufacturing workshops' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_50 Manufacturing spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Illuminance: 300–500 lux depending on task fineness per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1 and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.3.

NBS Source SL_30_50_60 'Packaging lines' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_50 Manufacturing spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Illuminance: 300 lux maintained per BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.6 packing / dispatch. HSE Workplace Regulations 1992 ACoP Schedule 1 minimum 100 lux (statutory floor); LG1:2018 §3.1 recommends 300 lux for quality-critical packaging.

NBS Source SL_30_50_61 'Paint spray booths' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_50 Manufacturing spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. ATEX Zone 1 or Zone 2 classification per BS EN 60079-10-1:2016 §5.5 due to flammable aerosol. Illuminance: 500 lux maintained per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1 (colour-critical spray work) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.5.

NBS Source SL_30_50_27 'Electronics clean rooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_50 Manufacturing spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. ISO 14644-1:2015 cleanliness class per process requirement (typically ISO Class 5–7 for semiconductor). Illuminance: 500 lux maintained per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.2 (precision work) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.7.

NBS Source SL_30_50_62 'Pharmaceuticals clean rooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_50 Manufacturing spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. EU GMP Annex 1:2022 (Manufacture of Sterile Medicinal Products) Grade A–D classification. Illuminance: 500 lux maintained per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.2 and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.7 (fine precision work).

NBS Source SL_30_50_40 'Kiln rooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_50 Manufacturing spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. High-temperature process space; ventilation per HSE Workplace Regulations 1992 ACoP §22 (adequate ventilation for heat and fume extraction). Illuminance: 200 lux per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1 (rough industrial work with radiant heat).

NBS Source SL_30_50_64 'Printing spaces' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_50 Manufacturing spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Illuminance: 500 lux maintained per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1 (colour printing) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.4 (printing industry). Noise criterion: BS 8233:2014 §8 Table 8 industrial background LAeq ≤ 85 dB(A).

NBS Source SL_30_50_43 'Light industrial spaces' is the closest verbatim parent leaf; assembly-line sub-type not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Sub-type differentiation follows CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1 (assembly work: 300–500 lux depending on component size) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.2 assembly work. Distinguishes from light_industrial_space (unspecified production) by task-oriented linear conveyor layout.

NBS Source SL_30_50_30 'Heavy industrial spaces' is the closest verbatim parent leaf; welding-bay sub-type not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Welding-bay classification follows CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1 (welding: 300 lux) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.1. ATEX / ELV arc-flash enclosure per HSE EH40 workplace exposure limits for welding fume (EH40/2005 revised 2020 Table 1, WEL for welding fume 1 mg/m³ 8-hr TWA); LEV required.

NBS Source SL_30_50_50 'Manufacturing workshops' is the closest verbatim parent leaf; machine-shop sub-type not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Machine-shop classification follows CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1 (medium machining: 300 lux; precision machining: 500–750 lux) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.3 machining. Distinguishes from manufacturing_workshop by exclusively CNC/lathe/milling tooling and coolant-oil hazard (LEV + drainage per HSE Workplace Regs 1992 ACoP §11).

NBS Source SL_30_40_50 'Meat processing rooms' is the closest NBS leaf under SL_30_40 Animal and plant products processing spaces; general food processing rooms extend this parent leaf. SL_30_40_07 Bottling rooms, SL_30_40_32 Fresh fruit and vegetable packing rooms, and SL_30_40_54 Milk processing rooms all confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Food-processing lighting: 500 lux maintained per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.10 food industry. FSA Food Hygiene Regulations (EC) 852/2004 Annex II Chapter I §2 adequate lighting in food rooms.

NBS Source SL_30_40_07 'Bottling rooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_40 Animal and plant products processing spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Illuminance: 300 lux per BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.6 packaging and CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1. Hygienic construction per Food Hygiene Regulations (EC) 852/2004 Annex II Chapter I.

NBS Source SL_30_20 'Nuclear and chemical management spaces' with SL_30_20_70 Radioactive decontamination spaces is the closest NBS sub-group; general chemical processing not individually enumerated at leaf level in Uniclass SL v1.35. Chemical-processing classification follows CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 (process plant: 200–300 lux) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.8 chemical industry. DSEAR (Dangerous Substances and Explosive Atmospheres Regulations 2002) zone classification mandatory; HSE Workplace Regs 1992 ACoP Schedule 1 ventilation for hazardous substances.

NBS Source SL_30_30_33 'Gas processing spaces' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_30 Mineral processing spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. ATEX Zone 1 classification per BS EN 60079-10-1:2016 §5.5 for flammable gas release sources. Illuminance: 200 lux per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 (process plant) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.8.

NBS Source SL_30_30_58 'Oil processing spaces' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_30 Mineral processing spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. DSEAR 2002 ATEX Zone 0/1/2 classification per BS EN 60079-10-1:2016 §5. Illuminance: 200 lux per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 process plant and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.8.

NBS Source SL_30_90_96 'Warehouse spaces' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_90 Warehousing and distribution spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Illuminance: 100–200 lux per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1 (storage: 100 lux aisle, 200 lux pick face) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.27.1 storage areas.

NBS Source SL_30_90_33 'Goods delivery bays' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_90 Warehousing and distribution spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Illuminance: 200 lux maintained per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1 (goods-in and dispatch) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.27.2 dispatch and receipt areas.

NBS Source SL_30_90_48 'Loading docks' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_90 Warehousing and distribution spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Illuminance: 150 lux per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1 (loading dock) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.27.2. Dock levellers, restraints, and vehicle exhaust LEV per HSE Workplace Regs 1992 ACoP §18.

NBS Source SL_30_90_80 'Sorting and distribution spaces' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_90 Warehousing and distribution spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Illuminance: 300 lux per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1 (sorting, reading labels) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.27.3 (picking and sorting).

NBS Source SL_90_50_15 'Cold stores' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_50 Storage spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06 (SL_90_50 has 50 current codes, not marked deprecated). Illuminance: 200 lux maintained per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 (cold stores: low-temperature luminaire selection mandatory) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.27.1. Food Standards Agency (FSA) Food Hygiene Regulations (EC) 852/2004 temperature control requirements apply.

NBS Source SL_90_50_38 'Hazardous waste storage spaces' is the closest verbatim leaf code under SL_90_50 Storage spaces; general hazardous materials storage extends this NBS parent. DSEAR 2002 zone classification mandatory. COSHH Regulations 2002 SI 2002/2677 §7 separation and containment. Illuminance: 200 lux per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 (hazardous store: explosion-proof luminaires where ATEX applies).

NBS Source SL_90_50_31 'Flammable chemical stores' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_50 Storage spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. ATEX Zone 1 classification required per BS EN 60079-10-1:2016 §5.5 for flammable liquid vapour release. HSE HSG51 'Storage of flammable liquids in containers' (4th edition, 2015) bunding and ventilation requirements apply.

NBS Source SL_90_50_71 'Raw materials storage spaces' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_50 Storage spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Illuminance: 100 lux per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1 (bulk storage aisles) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.27.1 storage areas.

NBS Source SL_90_50_85 'Storage silos' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_50 Storage spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. ATEX Zone 20/21 classification may apply for combustible dust (BS EN 60079-10-2:2015 §5). Structural loading per BS EN 1991-4:2006 (Actions on silos and tanks). Illuminance: 50 lux minimum access lighting per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1.

NBS Source SL_30_90_33 'Goods delivery bays' is the closest verbatim parent leaf; outbound dispatch sub-type not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Dispatch-area classification follows CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1 (dispatch: 200 lux) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.27.2 dispatch and receipt areas. Distinguishes from goods_delivery_bay (inbound) by outbound staging orientation.

NBS Source SL_90_50_15 'Cold stores' is the closest verbatim parent leaf; freezer-temperature sub-type (< −18 °C) not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Freezer-store design follows CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 (low-temperature luminaire selection: rated to −25 °C) and Food Standards Agency temperature-control requirements for frozen foods (≤ −18 °C). Distinguishes from cold_store (0–8 °C chill range).

NBS Source SL_30_60_50 'Maintenance workshops' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_60 Cleaning and maintenance spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Illuminance: 300–500 lux per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1 (maintenance work) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.3 (medium to fine mechanical work). HSE Workplace Regs 1992 ACoP §11 adequate workspace and access for safe maintenance.

NBS Source SL_30_60_93 'Vehicle-cleaning areas' is the closest verbatim NBS leaf under SL_30_60; general vehicle service bay uses this as parent anchor. SL_30_60_94 'Vehicle washes' also confirmed. Illuminance: 300–500 lux per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1 (vehicle repair) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.3. Vehicle exhaust LEV mandatory per HSE EH40:2005 revised 2020 (carbon monoxide WEL 20 ppm 8-hr TWA). ATEX Zone 2 if pit below grade with petrol vehicles.

NBS Source SL_30_60_50 'Maintenance workshops' is the closest verbatim parent leaf; electrical-workshop sub-type not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Electrical workshop classification follows CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1 (electrical/instrument work: 500 lux) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.3 fine precision. ESD control zones per BS EN 61340-5-1:2016 where applicable.

NBS Source SL_30_50_50 'Manufacturing workshops' is the closest verbatim parent leaf; carpentry-workshop sub-type not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Carpentry workshop follows CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1 (joinery: 300–500 lux) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.3 (woodworking). HSE EH40:2005 revised 2020 WEL for wood dust (5 mg/m³ 8-hr TWA, 1 mg/m³ for hardwood); LEV mandatory per COSHH Regs 2002. ATEX Zone 22 if fine wood dust accumulates.

NBS Source SL_30_60_50 'Maintenance workshops' is the closest verbatim parent leaf; fitter-workshop sub-type not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Classification follows CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1 (mechanical fitting: 300 lux) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.3. Bench vice and overhead crane anchorage per BS EN 15011:2011 (bridge and gantry cranes) where overhead lifting is required.

NBS Source SL_30_60_22 'Decontamination spaces' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_60 Cleaning and maintenance spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Illuminance: 500 lux per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.2 (precision inspection) and HSE guidance on decontamination facilities. COSHH Regulations 2002 SI 2002/2677 §7 decontamination procedure requirements.

NBS Source SL_90_90_15 'Control rooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_90 Plant and control spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Illuminance: 300–500 lux per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.3 (control rooms: glare-controlled for VDU work) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.9 (process control rooms). CIBSE Guide A:2015 §2.3 thermal comfort for 24-hr occupied control rooms.

NBS Source SL_90_90_64 'Plant rooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_90 Plant and control spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Illuminance: 200 lux per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 (plant room access) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.27.4 (plant and machinery rooms). BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §729 maintenance walkways and electrical separation for plant room wiring systems.

NBS Source SL_90_90_08 'Boiler rooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_90 Plant and control spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Gas Safety (Installation and Use) Regulations 1998 SI 1998/2451 §30 adequate ventilation for combustion air. BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.27.4 (plant room): 200 lux. CIBSE Guide B1:2016 §4.2 boilerhouse access and maintenance clearances.

NBS Source SL_90_90_85 'Switch rooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_90 Plant and control spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §132.12 and BS EN 61439-1:2011 §8.3 electrical clearances. Illuminance: 200 lux maintained per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 (electrical plant rooms) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.27.4.

NBS Source SL_90_50_27 'Equipment stores' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_50 Storage spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Tool-crib / tool-store sub-type extension follows CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1 (stores: 150–200 lux) and HSE Workplace Regs 1992 ACoP Schedule 1 minimum lighting. Distinguishes from general storeroom by precision tooling inventory control function.

NBS Source SL_30_50_50 'Manufacturing workshops' is the closest verbatim parent leaf; quality-control room sub-type not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. QC room classification follows CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.2 (inspection work: 750–1000 lux for fine detail inspection) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.12 (quality inspection). ISO 9001:2015 §8.6 product inspection and testing environment requirements.

SL_90_50_27 'Equipment stores' used as fallback anchor; first-aid room not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35 industrial sub-tree. Health and Safety (First Aid) Regulations 1981 SI 1981/917 Regulation 3 adequate first aid provision. HSE Workplace Regs 1992 ACoP §41 first-aid room requirements (sink with hot and cold water, accessible by stretcher, lockable medicine cabinet). Illuminance: 500 lux maintained per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.3 (clinical assessment tasks).

NBS Source SL_90_20_85 'Staff rooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_20 Common spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Industrial canteen extends the staff-room NBS parent per HSE Workplace Regs 1992 ACoP §27 (facilities for rest and eating meals). Illuminance: 200–300 lux per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.3 (canteen / rest room) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.3.1 break rooms.

NBS Source SL_90_50_48 'Locker rooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_50 Storage spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. HSE Workplace Regs 1992 ACoP §25 changing facilities (separate clean/dirty side for hazardous processes). Illuminance: 200 lux per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.3 (changing/welfare rooms) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.3.2.

NBS Source SL_90_20_85 'Staff rooms' is the closest verbatim parent leaf; site security office not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Security-office classification follows CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.3 (office work at industrial sites: 300–500 lux) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.3 offices. BS 8233:2014 §8 acoustic criteria for occupied security rooms adjacent to industrial noise sources.

NBS Source SL_30_10_69 'Quarrying areas' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_10 Mineral extraction spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. EXTERNAL ifc_space_type: open-pit extraction area. Quarries Regulations 1999 SI 1999/2024 health and safety requirements. Illuminance: emergency and task lighting per BS EN 12464-2:2014 (Lighting of outdoor work places) §5.9 extraction sites.

NBS Source SL_30_10_85 'Surface mine workings' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_10 Mineral extraction spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. EXTERNAL ifc_space_type: open-cut extraction. Mines Regulations 2014 SI 2014/3248 and Quarries Regulations 1999 SI 1999/2024 apply. Outdoor working lighting per BS EN 12464-2:2014 §5.9.

NBS Source SL_30_10_91 'Underground mine chambers' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_10 Mineral extraction spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Mines Regulations 2014 SI 2014/3248 underground lighting and emergency exit provisions. Illuminance: 50–100 lux per BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.1 (rough extraction work).

NBS Source SL_30_90_84 'Storage yards' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_90 Warehousing and distribution spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. EXTERNAL ifc_space_type: open hardstanding area. Outdoor lighting per BS EN 12464-2:2014 §5.1 external working areas. HSE Workplace Regs 1992 ACoP Schedule 1 minimum 20 lux outdoor storage.

NBS Source SL_90_90_63 'Plant enclosures' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_90 Plant and control spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. EXTERNAL ifc_space_type: outdoor fenced enclosure. Outdoor lighting per BS EN 12464-2:2014 §5.7 industrial plant compounds. BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §714 outdoor lighting installation requirements apply to any external luminaires.

NBS Source SL_30_90_84 'Storage yards' is the closest verbatim parent leaf; scaffold-specific compound not individually enumerated in Uniclass SL v1.35. Scaffold compound classification follows Work at Height Regulations 2005 SI 2005/735 §5 (scaffold storage, inspection, and tagging requirements) and HSE TG20:2013 guide to good practice for scaffolding. Outdoor lighting per BS EN 12464-2:2014 §5.1.

NBS Source SL_30_40_75 'Sawmills' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_40 Animal and plant products processing spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. ATEX Zone 21/22 for sawdust accumulations per BS EN 60079-10-2:2015 §5. Illuminance: 300 lux per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1 (timber processing). HSE EH40:2005 revised 2020 WEL for hardwood dust (1 mg/m³ 8-hr TWA); LEV mandatory.

NBS Source SL_30_40_50 'Meat processing rooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_40 Animal and plant products processing spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Food Hygiene Regulations (EC) 852/2004 and 853/2004 Annex III (animal products) apply. Illuminance: 500 lux maintained per BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.10 (meat and fish processing) and CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1. Sealed luminaires for IP65 wash-down.

NBS Source SL_30_40_30 'Fish processing rooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_40 Animal and plant products processing spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Food Hygiene Regulations (EC) 852/2004 and 853/2004 Annex III §VIII fish products apply. Illuminance: 500 lux maintained per BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.10 and CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1. IP65 sealed luminaires for wash-down environments.

NBS Source SL_30_40_82 'Spinning rooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_40 Animal and plant products processing spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Illuminance: 500 lux per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1 (fine textile work) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.11 (textile industry). Fibre dust: ATEX Zone 21 risk assessment required per BS EN 60079-10-2:2015 §5.

NBS Source SL_30_40_96 'Weaving rooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_40 Animal and plant products processing spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Illuminance: 500 lux per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1 (weaving: colour-critical task) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.11. Noise: looms typically 90–100 dB(A); HPE mandatory per HSE COSHH/noise ACoP 2005.

NBS Source SL_30_30_59 'Ore processing spaces' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_30 Mineral processing spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. ATEX Zone 21/22 dust classification per BS EN 60079-10-2:2015 §5 for dry mineral dust. Illuminance: 200 lux per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 (mineral processing: rough work) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.1.

NBS Source SL_30_60_47 'Laundries' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_60 Cleaning and maintenance spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Illuminance: 300 lux per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1 (laundry work) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.9. Ventilation for steam and moisture per HSE Workplace Regs 1992 ACoP §6 (adequate ventilation) and CIBSE Guide B2:2016 §5 moisture control.

NBS Source SL_30_60_94 'Vehicle washes' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_60 Cleaning and maintenance spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Illuminance: 200 lux per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 Table 1 (vehicle wash) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.2.9. IP65 luminaires mandatory (high-pressure wash environment). Site drainage: oil-water separator per BS EN 858-1:2002.

NBS Source SL_30_20_70 'Radioactive decontamination spaces' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_20 Nuclear and chemical management spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Ionising Radiations Regulations 2017 SI 2017/1075 §18 (controlled area designation) and ICRP Publication 103:2007 dose limits. Illuminance: 500 lux per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.2 (precision decontamination work).

NBS Source SL_90_90_68 'Pump rooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_90 Plant and control spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. Illuminance: 200 lux per CIBSE LG1:2018 §3.1 (plant rooms) and BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.27.4. DSEAR 2002 zone classification applies if pumping flammable liquids. BS EN 12845:2015 §9.5 fire pump room requirements for sprinkler installations.

NBS Source SL_90_90_90 'Transformer rooms' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_90_90 Plant and control spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §729 and BS EN 61936-1:2010 (power installations exceeding 1 kV) §6.5 transformer installation and clearances. Illuminance: 200 lux maintained per BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.27.4.

NBS Source SL_30_10_57 'Offshore oil and gas drilling spaces' is the verbatim leaf code under SL_30_10 Mineral extraction spaces. Confirmed on NBS primary mirror 2026-06-06. EXTERNAL ifc_space_type: open deck on offshore structure. DSEAR 2002 ATEX Zone 1/2 classification mandatory on drilling deck. PSSR 2000 (Pressure Systems Safety Regulations) applies. Outdoor lighting per BS EN 12464-2:2014 §5.9 for offshore working decks.
